# @uptimizr/babylon

> The Babylon.js connector for Uptimizr. Registers as an sdk-core collector and captures camera
> pose, pointer move/click, mesh picks, and FPS. `@babylonjs/core` is a (type-only) peer dependency.

## Docs

- [Package reference](./README.md): `trackScene`, advanced composition, sampling/fidelity, standalone playground bundle.
- [Agent guide](./AGENTS.md): rules and canonical usage for AI agents.
- [Integration & API reference](https://github.com/RaananW/Uptimizr/blob/main/docs/integration.md): track and query the data.
- [Architecture Decision Records](https://github.com/RaananW/Uptimizr/tree/main/docs/adr): input-source-agnostic events (0011), sampling & fidelity (0012).

## Key exports

- `trackScene(scene, options)` — one-call integration; returns the `UptimizrClient`.
- `babylonCollector(options)` — the collector for manual composition.
- `readDeviceCaps(scene)` — device/GPU caps for `session_start`.
